Off Calendar Aug-01-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Continued To Aug-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann appeared by zoom for Marquez Pierce.

The court asked for status of the blocked accounts. Mr. Vann stated that he still has the checks, that he did not deposit them into his attorney client trust account because he was instructed to separate the funds to qualify for FDIC insurance, and that he is now asking to be allowed to deposit the checks into his attorney client trust account. Mr. Vann also stated that his client is now incarcerated, that his client already took about $300,000.00, that he filed a declaration and that a petition for final distribution is ready to be filed. In addition, Mr. Vann stated that Wells Fargo and Chase refused to open blocked attorney client trust accounts for a sole client, spoke of conversations he had with bank representatives and efforts made to open the accounts as well as the banks concerns, stated that he has two checks in the amount of $195,115.94 each, and that a copy of an email from Inheritance Funding is attached to his declaration. The court stated that it is satisfied and that it will work with Mr. Vann to prepare an order and that it should rescind the order to deposit the funds into blocked accounts. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts is off calendar. Status on close of estate is continued to August 1, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipts Of Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Continued To Jul-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipts Of Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Continued To Jul-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-30-2023 Continued To Jun-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: G. Cat Stokes appearing specially for Attorney Dennis Vann on behalf of Marquez Pierce.

Mr. Stokes explained that Mr. Vann was not present because he is Solano County Court attending a hearing in the related estate. Mr. Stokes also stated that Mr. Vann told him that it will take a couple of days to open the blocked accounts, that escrow closed at the beginning of last week, that he got the funds last week and that he should have the receipts for the blocked accounts in about two to three weeks. In addition, Mr. Stokes stated that Mr. Vann filed an ex parte petition to have the funds named as an attorney client trust account, that the ex parte petition was approved last week, and that he has no information regarding closing of the estate. Status on close of the estate, and status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts are continued to June 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Vann is to file the receipts and file some sort of petition by June 20, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipts Of Blocked Accounts

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Continued To May-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann appeared by zoom for Marquez Pierce (personal representative).

Mr. Vann stated that escrow closed about a week and a half ago, that just after close of escrow he learned that his client was convicted of a misdemeanor in San Mateo County and had to turn himself in on March 18th for a 90-day incarceration, and that they attempted to open the estate accounts prior to close of escrow, but his client did not have proper identification to open the accounts. Mr. Vann also stated that the funds are still with the title company, that he has prepared an ex parte petition to have the title company issue the checks to him and he will open attorney client trust accounts, and that he intends to go to the jail on Friday and have his client sign the ex parte petition, and file it on Monday. The court stated that it will look forward to reviewing the ex parte petition and questions whether it is appropriate to suspend the administrator and have someone else appointed. Mr. Vann stated that his client is the sole beneficiary of the estate, that his client has received substantial advances on his inheritance, and that the reason they agreed to this is to protect the funding company. Status on close of estate, and status on filing receipts for the blocked accounts are continued to May 2, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Vann accomplish what was stated above.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Martinez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-28-2023 Continued To Apr-04-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann appeared by zoom for Marquez Pierce (petitioner).

Mr. Vann stated that the real property has been sold, that the other 50% was confirmed by Solano County Superior Court, and that the sale is expected to close within 10-days. Mr. Vann also stated that he has a signed status report ready for filing, but he prefers to do a petition for final distribution and that he is pretty sure his client will waive an accounting. Status on close of estate is continued to April 4, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (9 Garfield Street, San Francisco, Ca 94132)
Off Calendar Jan-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann, via Zoom, for Marquez Pierce, Administrator.

After discussion regarding the manner of vesting title on the proposed order, it is confirmed that the preceding shall remain as Tenants in Common, and the sale was confirmed at $433,400 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Status on Filing Receipts of Blocked Accounts is set for Mar-08-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel advises that he will submit proposed orders to the court regarding the blocked accounts.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.
